top.contains: A blue header bar featuring the text 'LOGO 50% OF THE DEPTH' on a pink banner and the 'prime' logo with its arrow graphic.

left.contains: A blue border containing a vertical pink banner with the text '5% OF WIDTH OF AD GIVES BORDER SIZE' rotated 90 degrees.

right.contains: A blue border containing a vertical yellow banner with the text 'CONTAINER 25% DEPTH OF AD' rotated -90 degrees.

frameAnalysis.corners: The entire outer frame contains branding and informational text.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main subject and title in the upper half to two-thirds of the image, ensuring they are clearly visible and centered above the cutout. The bottom of the art zone (roughly the bottom quarter) can be used for less critical elements or can be left relatively clear to allow for any future compositing.

frameInstructions: Place the main subject and title in the upper half to two-thirds of the image, ensuring they are clearly visible and centered above the cutout. The bottom of the art zone (roughly the bottom quarter) can be used for less critical elements or can be left relatively clear to allow for any future compositing.
